'''''The Agent''''' was one of the last [[Anxarta-class Freighter|''Anxarta''-class Freighters]] produced by [[Sienar Fleet Systems/Legends|Sienar Fleet Systems]], in approximately [[10 BBY/Legends|10 BBY]].

The [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] managed to obtain the ship and armed it with two turret-mounted twin laser cannons and one turret-mounted turbolaser cannon. The Rebel command allocated the ship to [[Scandium Team]] to use it as its main transport. It would be piloted by lead pilot [[Jouffer Talamiin]], and then by his replacement [[Aven Cholus]] after Talamiin was permanently grounded.

After Scandium Team was decimated on the [[Wellte-ir Massacre]] and then dismantled, Cholus kept ''The Agent'' and used it as her personal transport during her brief stay with [[Gale Team]]. After that, Cholus never used ''The Agent'' again, preferring to pilot shuttles.
